He is aSixth Gradestudent atSouth Park Elementarywho made his debut in "Pre-School". His character is added to the show in "Pre-School", along with a number of other 6th graders. In the episode, he is shown among the bully 6th graders who promise to protectthe boysfromTrent Boyettin exchange for a picture ofStan's mom's breasts, but are tricked by them with a picture ofCartman's ass, which they end up falling for. From this episode, the character begin to be used as a prop in theSchoolscenes in later episodes.

characters.name: 9th Grader with Purple Shirt
characters.description: 9th Grader with Purple ShirtCharacter InformationGenderMaleHairBrownOccupationStudentGrade9th GradeVoiced byTrey ParkerAppearancesFirst"Timmy 2000"(HD remaster)"Scott Tenorman Must Die" The9th Grader with Purple Shirtis an unnamed character who appears inSeason Five's episode "Scott Tenorman Must Die", where he and anotherunnamed 9th Graderare seen as friends ofScott Tenorman. He can be spotted earlier in the episode talking to Scott Tenorman and another 9th Grader. Scott tells them that he sold his pubes toCartman. Later the 9th Grader with Purple Shirt and the other unnamed 9th Grader bring the pubes to Scott, which according to them were pubes of almost every child in town. They later appear at the end of the episode, witnessing Cartman reveal to Scott that his parents were killed byFarmer Denkins.

characters.description: A.W.E.S.O.M.-O 4000Character InformationAliasesEric CartmanGenderMaleRaceRobotOccupationButters' ServantVoiced byTrey Parker[1]AppearancesFirst"AWESOM-O" A.W.E.S.O.M.-O 4000isEric Cartman's alter-ego in theSeason Eightepisode "AWESOM-O". Cartman attempted to prankButtersby pretending to be a robot made fromJapan, then revealing his identity. Butters said if Cartman pranks him again he would show everyone an embarrassing video of him pretending to beBritney Spearswhile dancing with aJustin Timberlakecardboard cutout.

characters.name: Aaron Hagen
characters.description: Aaron HagenCharacter InformationGenderMaleHairBrownAge6-7OccupationStudentGrade1st GradeRelativesFatherMr. HagenAppearancesFirst"Informative Murder Porn" Aaron Hagenis a boy who appears in theSeason Seventeenepisode, "Informative Murder Porn". In "Informative Murder Porn", Aaron's house became a crime scene ashis fatherwas found to have killed his mother with a knife. As the police investigate the scene, Aaron screamed dreadfully as he saw his mother being wheeled out by the paramedics. WhenHarrison Yatesnoticed this, the police covered Aaron with a purple blanket.

characters.name: Adam Borque
characters.description: Adam BorqueCurrentChaos #28Character InformationGenderMaleHairBrownOccupationStudentVoiced byTrey Parker[citation needed]AppearancesFirst"Pee"Speaking"Franchise Prequel" Adam Borqueis aSouth Park Elementarystudent. He appears in theSeason Twenty-Oneepisode, "Franchise Prequel", joiningProfessor Chaos' newarmy of minions. The Chaos Kids who are introduced in the episode are later heavily featured in theSouth Parkvideo game,South Park: The Fractured But Whole. Adam has brown hair. He wears a striped gray and green t-shirt with a blue-collar and dark blue pants. After meetingButtersand becoming aChaos Kid, Adam wears a tin foil hat molded into the shape of that of a bandit's, a black mask to hide his identity, and a wrap of tinfoil around his stomach that reads Chaos #28. In one scene in "SUPER HARD PCness", he is wearing red gloves.

characters.name: Al Pacino
characters.description: Al PacinoCharacter InformationGenderMaleRaceCaucasianHairBlackAge86Date of BirthApril 25, 1940OccupationActor, FilmmakerReligionCatholicWikipediaAl PacinoAppearancesFirst"#Happy Holograms" Alfredo James Pacino, better known professionally asAl Pacino, is an American actor most famous for his roles inThe GodfatherandScarface. He appears in theSeason Eighteenepisode, "#HappyHolograms". He was mentioned in "Ass Burgers" as a character in theAdam SandlerfilmJack and Jill', withStan Marshlaughing in the theater when Sandler's character proclaims that Al Pacino "wants to play twista with your sista'.

characters.name: Alex Glick
characters.description: Alex GlickCharacter InformationGenderMaleRaceCaucasianHairBlackVoiced byHimself[1]AppearancesFirst"Red Man's Greed"Latest"Red Man's Greed" Alex Glick, voiced by himself, had won a contest that allowed him to be inSouth Parkfor a guest appearance in theSeason Sevenepisode, "Red Man's Greed", for being the highest bidder at a charity auction to benefit AIDS research.[2] Alex Glick has only been in one episode, making his appearance in the episode "Red Man's Greed".

characters.name: Alexis Testaburger
characters.description: Alexis TestaburgerCharacter InformationGenderFemaleRaceCaucasianHairBlackOccupationCity PlannerVoiced byFormerly:Eliza J. Schneider[1]Currently:April Stewart[2]RelativesMother or Mother-in-LawGrandma TestaburgerHusbandMr. TestaburgerDaughterWendy TestaburgerEx-Son-in-LawDarwinAppearancesFirst"Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society" Alexis Testaburgeris theSouth ParkCity Planner of theCity Counciland mother ofWendy Testaburger. She is married toMr. Testaburger. Her first name was unknown untilSouth Park: The End of Obesity, where it was revealed to be Alexis. Alexis Testaburger wears a white shirt with a matching collar and a blue cardigan. She wears a brown skirt and has black hair. She also wears gold earrings as ofSeason Six. Her appearance is similar toMs. Stevens', but with a different nose.

characters.name: Alice's Parents
characters.description: Alice's ParentsCharacter InformationHairMother:RedFather:BrownRelativesDaughterAliceAppearancesFirst"Fat Camp" Alice's Parentsare minor characters seen in "Fat Camp". After the parents of theHopeful Hillscampersfind out about their kids not losing weight, they go to camp to take their kids back thinking camp is a waste of time, however the kids end up revealing thatCartmanis to blame for it. sell them candy at bedtime, and that the counselors did a good job. The parents then give thecounselorsanother chance and let their children stay at the camp.
